name: Linktree
description: Melbourne-founded bio-link platform helping creators and brands connect audiences to multiple URLs with one link.

seo.title: Linktree — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Linktree: Melbourne-founded bio-link platform helping creators and brands connect audiences to multiple URLs with one link.

when_to_use: Creator bio link aggregating social, store, and content URLs
Brand profile page linking to multiple campaign landing pages
Developer's single link hub for portfolio, GitHub, and blog
Musician's link page connecting fans to streaming and tickets
Marketing link hub for a product launch across channels

cons: Branded free tier hurts personal brand
review.verdict: Category-defining bio-link tool but creators who care about brand often migrate to Beacons or custom pages.
review.best_for: Creators and small brands wanting a fast, no-setup link hub
review.not_for: Serious brands wanting white-label design or on-domain bio pages

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
